name: Harness Phase 0 — Planner Primitives (Bulk Task Create + Search Context)
objective: Add the two primitives a planner runtime (Claude) needs to propose and persist work: (1) POST /api/agent/tasks supports bulk creation with duplicate detection — before writing, it checks for open tasks with identical titles and skips them; (2) POST /api/agent/search-context is a thin wrapper over the existing /api/kioku/search endpoint, returning structured results typed for agent consumption. This completes the PLANNING LANE contract. Planners use these two endpoints + context/bootstrap from harness-context-bootstrap to do their job — they never call the execution endpoints (claim, heartbeat, update).
exit_criteria: POST /api/agent/tasks accepts an array of task proposals and creates each one, skipping any with a title that matches an existing open task (dedup by normalized title).
POST /api/agent/search-context wraps /api/kioku/search and returns { query, tasks[], projects[], boards[] } — no raw vault objects.
bun test passes with no new failures.
